title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence
desc: Foundational lecture covering the history, key concepts, and current landscape of Artificial Intelligence and its applications.

title: AI Ethics and Responsible Innovation
desc: Ethical challenges in AI deployment including bias, fairness, transparency, and accountability in real-world systems.

title: From Raw Data to Insights
desc: Full data science pipeline from collection and cleaning to visualization and storytelling with real datasets.

title: Career Paths in AI and Big Data
desc: Industry professionals share insights on career opportunities, required skills, and growth paths in the AI field.

title: Neural Networks from Scratch
desc: Building and training neural networks from first principles using Python and NumPy without any ML frameworks.

title: Introduction to Cloud Computing for Data Science
desc: Overview of AWS, GCP, and Azure services for scalable data storage and ML workloads in the cloud.
